descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Juan De Fuca 6-1 in their quarter-final playoff series.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated Juan De Fuca 6-1 in their quarter-final playoff matchup to win the series 4-2, advancing in playoff action. The article also covers other BCJHL quarter-final results, including Kelowna's victory over Penticton and Delta's win over Nanaimo.
